description: ChallengeModal "Discuss" posts to /api/terminal/inject (ChallengeModal.jsx:38 via agentServerUrl) but no such route exists on ANY server — dead endpoint, 404s on localhost too (client-side counterpart of the COMP-COCKPIT-10 orphaned-route sweep). Found by the COMP-MOBILE-REMOTE review gate (flagged as a missing remote proxy; root cause is the endpoint never existing). Fix: wire a real inject path on the agent server + proxy it, or remove/disable the Discuss action.
phase: COMP-COCKPIT Wave 2: UX Journey Gaps (2026-06-10 sweep)

completions.notes: Fixed the dead ChallengeModal 'Discuss' endpoint: ChallengeRow.handleDiscuss repointed from the retired /api/terminal/inject to the live POST /api/agent/message (body { prompt }) on the agent server. ChallengeRow exported for testing. 2 UI tests (challenge-row-discuss) green, no regression in challenge-modal-host. Codex review CLEAN.
